props.flat: Removes the expansion-panel's elevation and borders.
props.gap: Sets the gap between panels. Hides the divider automatically.
props.modelValue: Controls expanded panel(s). Defaults to an empty array when using **multiple** prop. It is recommended to set unique `value` prop for the panels inside, otherwise index is used instead.
props.noDivider: Hides the dividers between adjacent panels.
props.readonly: Makes the entire expansion panel read only.
props.rounded: Applies a border radius to the first and last panel. Since v4.1.0 accepts array of two values to customize inner radius.
props.static: Remove title size expansion when selected.

exposed.prev: Open the previous panel from the currently selected panel.
exposed.next: Open the next panel from the currently selected panel.
